description: ICD10Data.com is a public reference website for browsing and searching American ICD-10-CM diagnosis and ICD-10-PCS procedure medical billing codes. It also offers licensed data files through a contact form and sales process.
summary: icd10data.com exposes a public website for ICD-10 code lookup and data licensing information, but no documented developer integration surfaces such as HTTP APIs, GraphQL, MCP servers, or CLIs were found on the domain.
